body_txt: A form of Involuntary Shapeshifting where the specific Transformation Cause is getting one's body drenched with water. This tends to be a property of Mermaids , who will often take a human form when outside of the water and revert to their mermaid form upon either reentering a body of water or simply getting wet. The commonness of water makes this a useful plot device to the author. The affected character can have indirect control over their form most of the time, but the plot can just as easily take that control away. See also Elemental Shapeshifter for someone who can transform into water and Making a Splash for someone who can control water. Compare Instant Oracle: Just Add Water! when water triggers visions. See also Kill It with Water .
